title: daucus gadecaei
intro: Daucus carota subsp. gummifer, also known as Daucus gadecaei, is a plant species in the carrot family (Apiaceae) that is native to the Mediterranean region. It is a biennial plant with a taproot and is also known as Wild Carrot or Daucus. The plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, and is said to have various health benefits such as reducing blood pressure and improving digestion. Daucus gadecaei can be used in herbal preparations such as infusions, decoctions, and tinctures to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
